description: Selected subcategories from the NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0, spanning Govern, Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, and Recover functions.

requirements.title: Cybersecurity policy established
requirements.description: A policy for managing cybersecurity risks is established based on organisational context, cybersecurity strategy, and priorities and is communicated and enforced.

requirements.title: Asset inventories maintained
requirements.description: Inventories of hardware managed by the organisation are maintained.

requirements.title: Identity and credential management
requirements.description: Identities and credentials for authorised users, services, and hardware are managed by the organisation.

requirements.title: Awareness and training provided
requirements.description: Personnel are provided cybersecurity awareness and training so that they can perform their cybersecurity-related tasks.

requirements.title: Networks monitored for anomalies
requirements.description: Networks and network services are monitored to find potentially adverse events.

requirements.title: Incident management executed
requirements.description: The incident response plan is executed in coordination with relevant third parties once an incident is declared.

requirements.title: Vulnerabilities identified
requirements.description: Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded.

requirements.title: Risk management objectives established
requirements.description: Risk management objectives are established and agreed to by organisational stakeholders.
